title: Void Fog
description: Brings back the void fog that was removed in Minecraft 1.8
body: [](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/void-fog) Brings back the void fog effect that was removed in Minecraft 1.8 * * * ##### **This is a client side only mod, you do not need to place it onto dedicated servers** * * * ![Example Image](https://droplet.tamaized.com/img/curseforge/voidfog/image.png) * * * [](https://www.patreon.com/Tamaized) [](https://ko-fi.com/tamaized) [](https://discord.gg/FgefzeUQvj)
